reviews.review_title: No Longer Works after META update?
reviews.review_description:
This app use to work some time ago but now it doesn't.
When it loads and Leonardo is sitting in front of you, he will start talking as long as you don't say anything but when you ask a question or say anything a banner appears saying System Error, Please Try Again in a Few Minutes.
I have deleted and reloaded it but no joy. 
I've made sure all of the app requirements have been met so I am believing this failure may have been caused by a META update since it did work before. 
If the DEVs are monitoring these comments, please update. This really is a neat app.

I've continued to check on updates for this app. I enjoyed talking with Leonardo but he's limited on what he wants to discuss or answer. Even still this app is so unique. I love the MR. I really hope it hasn't been abandoned. SO many other historical figures are possible here!

reviews.review_title: I want to have lunch with Michael Landon
reviews.review_description: Add more characters please? There are a lot of people that I want to chat with! One of them is MICHAEL LANDON! Please add this character to your next update?
Can you only talk to Leo at this point? Loved talking to him but time to Chat with someone else, unable to transition to a different person. Great idea but alot of room to grow.

I just had a conversation with Leonardo da Vinci in my living room, and it was as cool as it sounds! I know the app is still in early stages, but the potential is definitely there. Sure, Leo's accent occasionally sounded like a malfunctioning GPS, but who cares? We chatted about everything from the Mona Lisa to modern tech (he thinks the selfie stick is hilarious). Love this app!

It's amazing to have the opportunity to chat with a character of your choice. I love that the first character covers history, art, and engineering. What's really cool is that you can have different conversations each time, and you get to guide the discussion.

This was so awesome and fun, can’t wait for more people to be added to this app, had a funny moment when I asked about the Sistine Chapel, da Vinci was very quick to remind me that was Michelangelo and not him, so funny.

Had tons of fun discussing with Da Vinci about how to conquer the world and other irrelevant topics! Then, I saw the list and started asking questions about the past and his life... By the time I realised I have learned more from Da Vinci in a few moments than in my entire life.

Also, it is free! Highly recommended.
